title: Yôkihi
writer: Ching Doe, Matsutarô Kawaguchi, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Machiko Kyô, Masayuki Mori, Sô Yamamura
plot: In 8th-century China, the Emperor is grieving over the death of his wife. The Yang family wants to provide the Emperor with a consort so that they may consolidate their influence over the court. General An Lushan finds a close rel...
